title: Carnot Engine
description: The Carnot engine is the most efficient heat engine possible — a proof that no machine can convert heat to work without waste. Watch the four-stroke thermodynamic cycle on a P-V diagram, see energy flow as a Sankey diagram, and compare ideal (reversible) efficiency against real engine losses tracked live via entropy production.
interactive_controls: Explore: Carnot / Entropy & Waste / Arrow of Time
